_meta.description: Benchmark policy definition for the Acme Corp expense approval policy. Contains 4 intentional deficiencies that should cause specific test failures.

deficiencies.D1_wrong_implication: Rule R1AUTOAPROVE has reversed implication: says 'if auto-approved then amount <= 100' instead of 'if amount <= 100 then auto-approved'. Tests expecting auto-approval for small expenses will fail.
deficiencies.D2_wrong_threshold: Rule R3FINAPPROVE uses 1000 instead of 5000 as the finance approval threshold. Tests expecting no finance approval for $3,000 expenses will fail.
deficiencies.D3_missing_variable: Variable 'isInternational' is omitted from the definition. Tests about international travel reimbursement will get NO_TRANSLATIONS.
deficiencies.D4_ambiguous_description: Variable 'reimbursementDays' has a vague description ('days for reimbursement') instead of specifying the two tiers (5 days under $1000, 15 days for $1000+). Tests about reimbursement timing will get TRANSLATION_AMBIGUOUS.

ruleIdMap.R3FINAPPROVE: Finance approval rule (D2: wrong threshold 1000 instead of 5000)

rules.alternateExpression: if the expense is auto-approved, then the amount is $100 or less
if the expense amount is over $100 and up to $5,000, then manager approval is required
if the expense amount is over $1,000, then finance department approval is required
if the person is a full-time employee, then they can submit an expense report
if the person is a contractor, then they cannot submit an expense report
if the expense amount is over $25, then an itemized receipt is required
if the expense amount is $25 or less, then a receipt is not required
if the travel is domestic, then the daily meal allowance is $75
the expense amount is at least 0

variables.name: expenseAmount
variables.description: The dollar amount of the expense being submitted for reimbursement. Must be a non-negative whole number.

variables.name: isFullTimeEmployee
variables.description: Whether the person submitting the expense is a full-time employee of Acme Corp. Full-time employees are eligible to submit expense reports.

variables.name: isContractor
variables.description: Whether the person submitting the expense is a contractor. Contractors are not eligible to submit expense reports.

variables.name: canSubmitExpense
variables.description: Whether the person is allowed to submit an expense report.

variables.name: autoApproved
variables.description: Whether the expense is automatically approved without requiring any manager or finance approval. Expenses of $100 or less are auto-approved.

variables.name: requiresManagerApproval
variables.description: Whether the expense requires approval from the submitter's direct manager.

variables.name: requiresFinanceApproval
variables.description: Whether the expense requires approval from the finance department.

variables.name: receiptRequired
variables.description: Whether an itemized receipt must be attached to the expense report.

variables.name: isDomesticTravel
variables.description: Whether the travel is domestic (within the same country).

variables.name: dailyMealAllowance
variables.description: The maximum dollar amount allowed per day for meal expenses during travel.
